title: MeterDataRequest Payload
description: Root payload can be a MeterDataRequest, a MeterDataAuthorisation, or a MeterDataCapabilities document.

MeterDataRequestObject.title: MeterDataRequest
MeterDataRequestObject.description: Request parameters for selecting smart meter telemetry and profiles.

consumers.description: List of consumer URIs/DIDs for whom the data is requested (optional).

resources.description: List of resource URIs/DIDs (e.g. meter DIDs, service point IDs) to query (optional).

from.description: ISO 8601 UTC date-time indicating the start time of the requested data window.

duration.description: ISO 8601 duration string representing the length of the requested data window (e.g., PT15M, P1D, P30D).

authorisation.description: Inline authorization object or URI reference to it.

maxRecordsShared.description: Maximum number of records that should be shared or returned in a single batch/page.

MeterDataAuthorisation.title: MeterDataAuthorisation
MeterDataAuthorisation.description: Attestation details authorizing an entity to access specific capabilities.

grantor.description: URI/DID of the entity authorizing access.

validFrom.description: ISO 8601 UTC date-time indicating when the authorization becomes valid.

validUntil.description: ISO 8601 UTC date-time indicating when the authorization expires.

MeterDataCapabilities.title: MeterDataCapabilities
MeterDataCapabilities.description: Capabilities of a meter data provider, detailing supported profiles, values, scopes, and durations.

profiles.description: List of profiles and their specific values/modes.

supportedScopes.description: Hierarchical scopes supported by the query processor.

maxHistoryDuration.description: Maximum length of historical data window supported by the provider.

ProfileCapability.title: ProfileCapability
ProfileCapability.description: Declares capabilities for a specific profile class.

readings.description: Granular capabilities for specific registers and metrics. If omitted, all readings under this profile are supported.

ValueCapability.title: ValueCapability
ValueCapability.description: Declares capabilities for a specific register/reading within a profile.

value.description: The OBIS code (e.g. 1.0.1.8.0.255) or short code (e.g. kWh imp) representing the register.

mode.description: The telemetry mode (READING, USAGE) supported or requested for this register.

multiplier.description: Optional decimal multiplier scaling factor (e.g., 0.001 or 1000).

accuracy.description: Optional accuracy class or precision value.
